TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT ALBAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AND ITS ALTERNATE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S ALTERNATE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FAILED TO STATE WHAT PURPORTED UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS APPLIED TO ANY OF THE ISSUES SOUGHT TO BE SUMMARILY ADJUDICATED. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Alesio, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties David Wilson, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT ALBAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration and Mr. Cohen's declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing gaskets attributable to defendant. Defendant's alternate motion for summary adjudication failed to state what purported undisputed material facts applied to any of the issues sought to be summarily adjudicated.
